briefdescription.para: Key event signal type.
Key event generated signal type.
Touch signal type.
Touched signal type.
Wheel event generated signal type.
Focus changed generated signal type.
Create an uninitialized SceneHolder handle.
Destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: This copy constructor is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the copied handle

briefdescription.para: This assignment operator is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the copied handle

briefdescription.para: This move constructor is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the moved handle

briefdescription.para: This move assignment operator is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the moved handle

briefdescription.para: Adds a child Actor to the SceneHolder.

detaileddescription.para:
The child will be referenced.
actor
The child
The actor has been initialized.
The actor does not have a parent.

briefdescription.para: Removes a child Actor from the SceneHolder.

detaileddescription.para:
The child will be unreferenced.
actor
The child
The actor has been added to the SceneHolder.

briefdescription.para: Returns the Scene's Root Layer.
Sets the background color.
Gets the background color.
Gets the native handle.

detaileddescription.para: When users call this function, it wraps the actual type used by the underlying system.

simplesect.para: The native handle or an empty handle

briefdescription.para: Feed (Send) touch event to core.
Feed (Send) wheel event to core.
Feed (Send) key event to core.

parameterdescription.para: The key event holding the key information.

briefdescription.para: Feed (Send) hover event to core.

parameterdescription.para: The touch point that create a hover event

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the processes using geometry event propagation touch and hover events.

parameterdescription.para: True if the processes using geometry event propagation touch and hover events.

briefdescription.para: Queries whether the scene using geometry event propagation touch and hover events.

simplesect.para: True if the scene using geometry event propagation touch and hover events.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the list of render-tasks.

simplesect.para: A valid handle to a RenderTaskList

briefdescription.para: Gets the native window id.
This signal is emitted when key event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(constKeyEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when key event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: boolYourCallbackName(constKeyEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when key event is received. Intercepts KeyEvents in the window before dispatching KeyEvents to the control. If a KeyEvent is consumed, no KeyEvent is delivered to the control.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: boolYourCallbackName(constKeyEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when key event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(constKeyEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the screen is touched and when the touch ends (i.e. the down & up touch events only).
This signal is emitted when wheel event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(constWheelEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted to KeyboardFocusManager when a custom wheel type event is received. When a custom wheel event occurs, it need to process the focused actor first.

detaileddescription.para: Therefore, KeyboardFocusManager first checks whether WheelEvent is generated as WheelEventGeneratedSignal. This is only valid for custom wheel events.

A callback of the following type may be connected: boolYourCallbackName(constWheelEvent&event);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the window focus changes.

detaileddescription.para: Although there is already a focus change signal in the window, it has been added to the scene-holder to ensure that the keyboardFocusManager processes the focus change signal after all window focus change signals have been handled.

A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(Dali::Integration::SceneHoldersceneHolder,boolfocusIn);
The signal to connect to

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used internally to create additional SceneHolder handles.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Downcast BaseHandle to SceneHolder.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.35
handle
The handle need to downcast
Whether it's a valid SceneHolder or not

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the SceneHolder that the given actor is added to.

simplesect.para: The SceneHolder the actor is added to or an empty handle if the actor is not added to any SceneHolder.

briefdescription.para: SceneHolder is responsible for creating a Scene for rendering.
